---
title: "Transformer intuition: attention nhin nhu the nao"
date: 2026-06-13
categories: [ai, deep-learning]
description: "Mot bai mau cho cac chu de AI, tap trung vao trinh bay y tuong va hinh minh hoa."
image: ../../assets/images/posts/transformers-intuition/cover.svg
lang: vi
---

Day la bai mau cho nhom bai viet AI.

## Core idea

Attention cho phep mo hinh tu quyet dinh phan nao cua input la quan trong nhat cho moi token.

![](../../assets/images/posts/transformers-intuition/cover.svg)

## Media workflow

Neu bai viet co animation, source nam trong `src/manim/posts/transformers-intuition/`, con file da render nam trong `assets/animations/rendered/`.
